text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Um, you're that model, Gold City,<n>aren't you?
I've always wanted to<n>meet you!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, I gotta get to training, so can<n>we chat
another ti—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Then, can I at least get your<n>autograph?! I have a
magazine with<n>your picture in it!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Well, I don't really do that sorta thing<n>at school,
so uh...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sigh. I really don't have time forthis today...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa there, nuh-uh! Requests like<n>that need to
go through her agency!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
City's a professional! If she handed<n>out
autographs like candy, she'd be<n>in deep trouble!
☆

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Ah! I'm so sorry, I didn't know! I-I'll<n>just be
going now!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Girl, you're so bad at saying no, it's<n>legit
hilarious. ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Shoulda just told her the truth—if you<n>give out
one autograph, you'll have<n>the whole school
flocking around you.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah... What was it she called<n>me? "That
model"?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
If that's still all people know me for,<n>then I've
got a lotta work to do.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: All right, time to train. See ya.
